## [30:25 - 33:25]

Well, what we can do is we can learn the markers of our existence. So we've got two types of markers. We've got peak markers and we've got trough markers. So, you know, if you, in your bank account, you might go up to say $5,000 and then when you get to $5,000, you might start thinking, oh, like things are good and everything. And then a trough marker is something that you do at the low just before you start climbing up again. So that might be when your bank account gets to $500 and you start panicking.
